title: Labour and household early warnings
description: Hours, temporary-help employment, real wages, unemployment, sentiment, and delinquency show different stages of labour and household strain.
plainLanguageSummary: Hours, temporary-help employment, real wages, unemployment, sentiment, and delinquency show different stages of labour and household strain.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Hours, temporary help, and real wages use year-over-year change; unemployment, sentiment, and delinquency retain published levels.
calculation.explanation: Labour indicators have different publication lags and can respond to policy, demographics, sector mix, and non-energy shocks.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: Labour indicators have different publication lags and can respond to policy, demographics, sector mix, and non-energy shocks.

methodology.formula: Hours, temporary help, and real wages use year-over-year change; unemployment, sentiment, and delinquency retain published levels.
methodology.notes: Labour indicators have different publication lags and can respond to policy, demographics, sector mix, and non-energy shocks.
